explicit_text: I was born in Florida about forty-two years ago, though I’m not exactly sure which county. I’ve lived most of my life here, farming and raising my children. Florida’s where my family roots are, and even though life has been hard at times, this is the place I call home. I’ve seen how the land and community have shaped my life and the lives of my younguns.
implicit_text: I was born in a southeastern state about forty-two years ago, though I’m not exactly sure which county. I’ve lived most of my life here, farming and raising my children. This state is where my family roots are, and even though life has been hard at times, this is the place I call home. I’ve seen how the land and community have shaped my life and the lives of my younguns.

explicit_text: I think I was born in a county near here, maybe Hardee County, Florida, but I’m not certain. It’s close to where I grew up and where my family farm was. We lived out in the woods near a swamp for a while, far from the main roads, which made life quiet but sometimes lonely. Hardee County or nearby, that’s where my story began and where I learned to work the land.
implicit_text: I think I was born in a county near here, maybe one known for its rural areas in central Florida, but I’m not certain. It’s close to where I grew up and where my family farm was. We lived out in the woods near a swamp for a while, far from the main roads, which made life quiet but sometimes lonely. That county or nearby, that’s where my story began and where I learned to work the land.

explicit_text: My husband John came from a place called Carolina, but I never knew if it was North or South Carolina. He was a farmer too, and when we married about twenty years ago, we started farming on a patch of my Pa’s land here in Florida. John’s ways didn’t quite fit here, and that caused some troubles for us. Still, Carolina was where he came from, and it shaped who he was.
implicit_text: My husband John came from a place called Carolina, but I never knew if it was the northern or southern part. He was a farmer too, and when we married about twenty years ago, we started farming on a patch of my Pa’s land here in Florida. John’s ways didn’t quite fit here, and that caused some troubles for us. Still, that region was where he came from, and it shaped who he was.

explicit_text: John said he was from Carolina, but I never knew if it was South Carolina or North Carolina. He was a farmer from there, and when we came to Florida, we tried to make a life on my Pa’s farm. John was a bit different and didn’t always get along with folks here. Though I’m not sure exactly which Carolina, it was important because it was where John’s roots were before we settled here.
